onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Select system language and learning topic.
onboarding.topic_label: What do you want to learn?
onboarding.topic_placeholder: E.g., Python Programming, World History, etc.
onboarding.level_label: What is your current understanding level?
onboarding.duration_label: How many weeks is your target?
onboarding.hours_label: How many hours per day can you dedicate?
onboarding.upload_title: Have a roadmap, syllabus, or reference document?
onboarding.upload_subtitle: The system can read your custom references and use them as a foundation for generating the curriculum structure to make it more relevant to your goals.
onboarding.upload_placeholder: Drag & drop PDF here, or click to select file

curriculum.title: Curriculum
curriculum.empty_desc: Start your learning journey by creating a new curriculum through onboarding.
curriculum.select_module: Select a module below to start learning.
curriculum.empty_weeks_desc: This curriculum does not have any weeks/topics yet. Try restarting onboarding.
curriculum.click_instruction: Click a concept to see details • Click a topic to start learning

module.tutor_intro: Is there any unclear part? I'm ready to explain it in more detail based on the material
module.tutor_suggestion_1: Explain this topic in more detail
module.generating_desc: AI Tutor is gathering and composing the learning material. Please wait a moment (1-2 minutes).
module.module_locked_desc: You must complete the previous module first to unlock this material.
module.module_not_found_desc: This topic does not have module content yet. Please check back later.

dashboard.feedback_eval_msg: The system is detecting your comprehension level.
dashboard.feedback_repeat_msg: Your mastery score on the last material was {{score}}%. The system recommends repeating a simplified version. Please click 'Continue Learning' to restart.
dashboard.feedback_review_msg: Your mastery score on the last material was {{score}}%. To strengthen your understanding, a special Review topic has been inserted into your schedule.
dashboard.feedback_accel_msg: Your mastery score is {{score}}%. You understand the material very well! The schedule has been accelerated to match your abilities.
dashboard.ready: Ready to continue your learning journey today?
dashboard.no_session_desc: No active session. Create your first curriculum and let Planner Agent build a personalized learning path for you.
dashboard.all_topics_desc: You have completed all available materials. It is time to review or start a new topic.
dashboard.no_activity_desc: Start learning to see your activity history here. Complete a module or take a quiz to start populating your history.
dashboard.no_topic_today_desc: You have completed all materials for today. Perfect time to rest!
dashboard.login_tomorrow_streak: 💡 Login tomorrow to increase streak. Skip one day =
dashboard.login_today_streak: 💡 Login today to start your first streak.
dashboard.complete_quizzes_for_xp: Complete topic quizzes to increase mastery → XP.
dashboard.no_messages: No messages to Tutor AI yet.
dashboard.score_auto: Scores will appear automatically every time Tutor AI replies.
dashboard.faithfulness_tooltip: How consistent the Tutor's answer is with the retrieved context
dashboard.relevancy_tooltip: How relevant the Tutor's answer is to the user's question

chat.title: Ask Synapsa Chatbot
chat.subtitle: General AI Assistant • Comprehensive answers
chat.invalid_session: Invalid chat session. Please try sending again.
chat.input_placeholder: Ask anything or upload a document...
chat.no_topic: No topics yet. Start a learning session to create a curriculum.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage your profile, learning preferences, appearance, and progress data.
settings.profile_edit_soon: Profile editing will be available soon
settings.learning_desc: Summary of active learning sessions and your learning preferences.
settings.reset_session_desc_active: This action will delete the active session and progress related to this session.
settings.data_desc: Export your progress or manage your account.
settings.delete_account_desc: This feature is not yet available. Coming soon.
settings.export_desc: Download all session, topic, and quiz history data in JSON format.

quiz.history_desc: All quizzes you have ever taken, grouped by topic.
quiz.no_history_desc: Start taking quizzes on any topic to see the history here.
quiz.failed_load_detail_desc: Unable to fetch attempt details from the server. Try closing and reopening the Review modal.
quiz.no_detail_desc: Question details for this attempt have not been recorded. The overall score ({{correct}}/{{total}}) is saved.
quiz.no_detail_zero: This quiz has no answer details
quiz.no_detail_zero_desc: This attempt was recorded with 0 questions. It's likely the system failed to generate quiz questions during this attempt. Per-question details cannot be displayed.

common.error_loading: This page failed to load. Please try again or go back to dashboard.
